title: Resolution Endorsing to the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw the Collective Data From Series of Consultation with Meralco, Pldt. and Other Utility Providers, Regarding the Relocation of Utility Poles of Respective Entities for the Perusal of the Executive Branch. (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 02/01/2021)
